questionHtml: Hypochlorhydria is a condition whereby patients produce low quantities of stomach acid. Outline the effect this might have on the normal processes within the stomach.
markschemeHtml:
a. reduced resistance to pathogens ✔

b. pH not optimum for pepsin activity ✔

c. activation of enzymes/pepsinogen is reduced ✔

d. reduced food/protein digestion ✔

meta.title: Hypochlorhydria is a condition whereby patients produce low quantities of stomach acid. Outline the effect this might have on the normal processes within the stomach.
